meta.siteTitle: Luxora Reinigungsservice — Professional Home Cleaning Berlin
meta.siteDesc: Professional cleaning services in Berlin and surrounding areas. Sofas, windows, apartments, driveways, car interiors. Free estimate. Reply in 10 minutes.
meta.homeDesc: From sofas and windows to full apartments, driveways and car interiors. Professional cleaning at your door across Berlin. New clients get 20% off.
meta.contactDesc: Get a free estimate. Fill in your details and a manager will call you within 10 minutes to confirm the details and arrange a specialist visit.

footer.brandDesc: Professional cleaning services in Berlin and surrounding areas. Trusted, certified and always on time.

hero.para: From sofas and windows to full apartments, driveways and car interiors. Professional cleaning at your door across Berlin

whyUs.desc: Trusted professionals, consistent quality, and attention to every detail — creating a home that feels fresh, comfortable, and cared for.

schedule.title: Cleaning On Your Schedule
schedule.desc: Whether you're home or away, our trusted team cleans your space safely, securely, and professionally.

punctual.title: Punctual & Reliable
punctual.desc: Your time matters. We arrive as scheduled and complete every service with efficiency and care.

certified.title: Certified & Insured Team
certified.desc: Our professional cleaners are carefully vetted, fully insured, and trained to deliver exceptional service.

safe.title: Safe For Families & Pets
safe.desc: We use eco-friendly, fabric-safe products that are gentle on your home and safe for children and pets.

services.subtext: Fill the form → We call you within 10 min → You get a fixed price
services.footnoteText: Final price depends on size and condition. VAT Includes: travel, cleaning products, all equipment

windows.name: Window Cleaning
bullets: Interior and exterior cleaning of all panes, including hard-to-reach areas
Streak-free result using professional squeegee equipment and cleaning solution
Frames, window sills and tracks carefully cleaned by hand after each panel

upholstery.name: Upholstery & Carpet Cleaning
bullets: Deep cleaning for sofas, mattresses, carpets, rugs and soft furniture
Removes stubborn stains, odors, pet hair and allergens from deep in the fabric
Safe for all fabric types including delicate, mixed and everyday upholstery

apartment.name: Apartment & House Cleaning
bullets: Thorough cleaning of every room including hallways, storage areas and balconies
Kitchens, bathrooms, floors and all surfaces cleaned carefully with professional products
Available as a one-time deep clean or as a regular recurring service

driveway.name: Driveway & Patio Washing
bullets: High-pressure washing for brick driveways, patios and yard surfaces
Removes moss, dirt, oil stains and weathering from paving stones
Includes kerbs, path edges and hard-to-reach corners

car.name: Car Interior Detailing
bullets: Full interior cleaning: seats, ceiling, door panels and trunk
Extractor deep clean removes dirt and odors from deep in the fabric
Leather and plastic care: protected and refreshed
car.footnote: Access to a standard 220V outlet required

Want to see our work in detail?
Follow us to see before-and-after cleaning results

newClient.title: New Client
newClient.desc: First time booking with us? Your first booking is 20% off. Applies to any service, taken off before you pay

twoServices.title: 2 Services at Once
twoServices.desc: Book 2 services during the same visit and receive 30% off your third service during the appointment

threeServices.title: 3 Services at Once
threeServices.desc: Book 3 services during the same visit and get 50% off your fourth service appointment

rewards.discountFootnote: Save more when booking multiple services in one visit

referral.desc: Know someone whose home could use a good clean? Send them our way. You get 15% off your next booking. They get 20% off their first.

review.desc: Loved your cleaning? Leave a quick review on Google or Instagram and receive 10% off your next service.

reviews.subtext: Real feedback from real people across Berlin and surrounding areas

items.text: Had my sofa deep cleaned after two years. The difference is incredible — no more stains or pet hair. Done in under two hours, no mess left behind. Worth every penny!
Booked them for a full apartment clean before my parents visited. Kitchen, bathroom, floors — all spotless. They even cleaned behind the furniture. My mother was absolutely delighted!
Used their window cleaning for our floor-to-ceiling windows. Eight large panes, inside and out, zero streaks. The apartment looks completely different when the light pours in!
Had the driveway and patio pressure-washed after years of moss and grime. Completely unrecognizable — like a new surface. Fast, tidy, and exactly what we needed.
Booked a full apartment clean after renovation work. Dust everywhere, paint residue on floors — they tackled everything in one visit. Would absolutely recommend to anyone.

faq.subtext: Can't find your answer here? Write to us. We reply within 10 minutes

items.q: What should I prepare before the cleaning?
items.a: Please ensure access to water and electricity, and clear the areas to be cleaned from personal items. This helps us work efficiently and deliver the best result.
We accept cash, bank transfer and PayPal. Payment is made after the service is completed and you are happy with the result. We will confirm the payment details when we call to confirm your booking.

Yes, you can cancel or reschedule free of charge up to 24 hours before the appointment. For cancellations with less than 24 hours notice, a small travel fee may apply. Just call or message us and we will sort it out.

items.q: How much does a cleaning cost?
items.a: Prices start from €60 for window cleaning, €80 for upholstery/carpet, €120 for apartments. Final price depends on size and condition — we give you an exact quote before starting.

items.q: Do you bring your own equipment?
items.a: Yes, absolutely. Our team brings all professional cleaning equipment and eco-friendly products. You don't need to provide anything except access to water and a standard power outlet.
We cover Berlin and all surrounding areas within a 100 km radius. If you're unsure whether we service your area, just ask — we'll confirm within minutes.

finalCta.subtext: First booking with us? New clients get 20% off. Leave a request and we'll reach out to discuss the details
